title: Golden Crispy Norwegian Tofu Onigiri
description: A savory and crispy Norwegian dish featuring beer and plant-based friendly ingredients, shaped into nigiri, perfect for adventurous eaters.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add the beer to the bowl, whisking until the batter is smooth.
Add the tofu cubes to the batter, tossing to coat.
Fry the tofu cubes in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fried tofu from the oil and place on a paper towel lined plate.
In a small bowl, mix together the sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper.
Sprinkle the sesame seed mixture over the fried tofu.
Shape the tofu into small nigiri shapes.
Serve the golden crispy norwegian tofu onigiri hot and enjoy.
